about.en: Conflux is a layer 1 smart contract blockchain that uses a proof-of-work consensus design and a Tree-Graph architecture to increase throughput while preserving parallel block production. CFX is the native asset used for transaction fees, staking, storage collateral, governance, and network incentives. The project is often associated with Asia-focused Web3 infrastructure and EVM-compatible application deployment.
about.es: Conflux es una blockchain de capa 1 para smart contracts que usa proof of work y una arquitectura Tree-Graph para aumentar el rendimiento manteniendo la produccion paralela de bloques. CFX es el activo nativo usado para comisiones, staking, colateral de almacenamiento, gobernanza e incentivos de red. El proyecto se asocia con infraestructura Web3 enfocada en Asia y despliegues compatibles con EVM.
about.ca: Conflux es una blockchain de capa 1 per a smart contracts que usa proof of work i una arquitectura Tree-Graph per augmentar el rendiment mantenint la produccio paralela de blocs. CFX es l'actiu natiu usat per a comissions, staking, colateral d'emmagatzematge, governanca i incentius de xarxa. El projecte s'associa amb infraestructura Web3 enfocada a Asia i desplegaments compatibles amb EVM.
